introSection: Ciclón is a steel roller coaster currently located at PPS Park Platja d'Aro in Platja d'Aro, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Black track and white supports. The coaster used to feature red track and blue supports.

fullText:
Ciclón is a steel roller coaster currently located at PPS Park Platja d'Aro in Platja d'Aro, Girona, Catalonia, Spain.



Black track and white supports. The coaster used to feature red track and blue supports.
